model.killer_demo.stg_events.name: stg_events
model.killer_demo.stg_events.raw_sql: select event_id, user_id, event_ts, amount_usd from raw.events
model.killer_demo.stg_events.compiled_sql: select event_id, user_id, event_ts, amount_usd from raw.events

model.killer_demo.finance_daily_revenue.name: finance_daily_revenue
model.killer_demo.finance_daily_revenue.raw_sql: select date(event_ts) as reporting_day, sum(amount_usd) as revenue_usd, count(*) as event_count from {{ ref('stg_events') }} group by 1
model.killer_demo.finance_daily_revenue.compiled_sql: select date(event_ts) as reporting_day, sum(amount_usd) as revenue_usd, count(*) as event_count from analytics.stg_events group by 1
